answer:
To authenticate requests to the Attio REST API, you must use an access token passed in the Authorization header [1][2]. The standard method is Bearer authentication [1][3]:

```http
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

You can obtain an access token using one of two methods [1]:

1. OAuth 2.0 Flow: Recommended for apps serving multiple workspaces; involves a standard authorization code exchange [1][4].
2. API Key: Suitable for apps targeting a single workspace; can be generated via your app's developer settings [1].

While HTTP Basic Authentication is technically supported, Bearer authentication is the recommended approach [1].
